suite.name: Chat Tests

test.name: TC_CHAT_003 - Send Multiple Messages

kw.name: Open Application
kw.doc: Opens a new application to given Appium server. Capabilities of appium server, Android and iOS, Please check https://appium.io/docs/en/2.19/guides/caps/ | *Option* | *Man.* | *Description* | | remote_url | Yes | Appium server url | | alias | No | alias |

kw.name: Sleep
kw.msg: Exception ignored in: <_io.BufferedWriter name=-1> Traceback (most recent call last): File "C:\Users\PC\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\Lib\socket.py", line 737, in write return self._sock.send(b) ConnectionResetError: [WinError 10054] An existing connection was forcibly closed by the remote host
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Close Chat Application
Run Keyword If Test Failed
Capture Page Screenshot
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.msg:
WebDriverException: Message: 'GET /screenshot' cannot be proxied to UiAutomator2 server because the instrumentation process is not running (probably crashed). Check the server log and/or the logcat output for more details Stacktrace: UnknownError: 'GET /screenshot' cannot be proxied to UiAutomator2 server because the instrumentation process is not running (probably crashed). kw.name: Close Application
kw.doc: Closes the current application and also close webdriver session.
Closes the app and captures screenshot on failure

test.doc: User sends multiple messages in sequence

suite.doc: Functional tests for Chat features Tests the main chat functionality of Smart Assistant
